token_family_docs.$description: Typography-context mode collection — text rendering for UI versus reading content. Modes: interface (the base — no class is applied), prose (.ob-typography-context-prose). Each mode carries the CSS class string the application adds to a container to activate it.

selector.$description: interface is the base typography-context mode — no class is applied. It is the first-paint default.
Developer-facing class. The application adds it to a container to activate prose typography context.
